description: You are the Clinical Research Coordinator for the newly activated Boston Heart Institute site, which is part of the Cardiovascular Outcomes Registry (CV-REG-2023) parent study. In OpenClinica (login: root / Admin123!), enroll two subjects at the Boston Heart Institute site level: CV-201 (Male, DOB: 1958-06-12, Enrollment Date: 2024-04-15) and CV-202 (Female, DOB: 1971-09-28, Enrollment Date: 2024-04-18). Schedule a 'Screening Visit' for both subjects at Cardiology Wing B, with CV-201 starting 2024-04-15 and CV-202 starting 2024-04-18. Assign user 'mrivera' the role of 'clinical_research_coordinator' for the Boston Heart Institute site.
